NEAR Wallet

NEAR Ecosystem Wallets

Explore a range of user-friendly wallets designed to meet your needs.

Meteor Wallet

Wallet for NEAR with zero-fee swaps & cross-chain bridging. Web, extension, and mobile app ready.

Hot Wallet

Telegram wallet with deep NEAR support, NEAR Launchpad, Liquid Staking and multichain bridge.

NEAR Mobile

A non-custodial wallet that is easy to use and well designed to manage your crypto wherever you go.

Ethereum Wallet

Use any of your favorite EVM wallets seamlessly with NEAR Protocol.

HERE Wallet

Non-custodial mobile wallet with a friendly user interface and advanced features.

Bitte Wallet

Smart, simple access to crypto on any blockchain. Powered by in-wallet AI agents.

Nightly Wallet

A mobile and extension wallet, with support for multiple ecosystems.

Sweat Wallet

Your secure non-custodial wallet with gamified movement-based earnings & rewards.

WELLDONE Wallet

A multi-chain extension wallet that gives you control over all your assets from a single platform.

Sender Wallet

Security-audited mobile & extension wallet with 1M+ users, supporting NEAR & Aurora.

MyNearWallet

A browser based wallet that offers the same UI and features of wallet.near.org.

A new era for NEAR wallets

Wasn't this site a wallet?

wallet.near.org's wallet service has been discontinued

If you have not already done so, please import your account to a new wallet using your recovery phrase. If you created an email or text message backup, your recovery link will still work but now defaults to app.mynearwallet.com

If you think you have a recovery backup email but are not sure how to find it, search your email for "Near Wallet Recovery" in the subject line (include quotes for better results)

Learn More
